# Pull Request Template

## Summary

Provide a concise summary of the change.

## Implementation

Describe the implementation, files changed, and why the change is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration or end-to-end tests added or updated
- [ ] Benchmarks updated if performance-sensitive

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant docs updated in `docs/`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Notes

- link to issue if available
- note any compatibility or release-impacting changes
